_comment: hub_lake_dir overrides where hub_prices parquet is read from. Leave blank to auto-detect ../Ercot_Data_Hub/data/hub_prices then ../Ercot_Price_Data/data. eia_api_key is optional: without it the Henry Hub gas history falls back to the seed CSV in data/inputs/ and the forward strip falls back to your manual data/inputs/gas_curve.csv.
